divergence: A plague wiped out 90% of humanity and the remaining 10% still can't get a plumber
story_angle: deadpan report of a catastrophe that everyone involved considers a great success
headline: Wasteland Sanitation Authority Declares Ir:Vess Tunnel Flood a Quota Compliance Triumph
deck: Citizens advised to taste static, count blessings amid overflowing compliance.
article:
In a bold display of bureaucratic prowess, the Wasteland Sanitation Authority has classified the Ir:Vess Tunnel flood event as a resounding success in meeting its fiscal efficiency benchmarks. With 63% less water claims logged since the flood's commencement, officials are heralding this as a watershed moment for the remaining 10% of humanity. Citizens are now officially encouraged to navigate by tasting residual static, a practice previously recommended only for culinary experimentation.

"We are excited to report that our compliance tether reports an unprecedented reduction in water-related incident claims, despite the aquatic excess surrounding the Ir:Vess zone," noted Chief Metrician Zun:Barh. "This significant achievement indicates that our strategic reallocation of resources truly reflects a commitment to maintaining operational standards at the projected 41% collapse threshold."

While some skeptics argue that flooding tunnels and displacing denizens could be construed as counterproductive, the Sanitation Authority insists that terms like 'total habitat loss' must be redefined as 'creative resource redistribution.' Many citizens, however, are less concerned about habitat than they are about simply locating solid ground amidst the billowing chaos of their own lives.

As the Ir:Vess area remains engulfed in rising waters, officials continue to advise against the notion of traditional plumbing solutions. In these trying times, survival requires innovation, multiple taste-testings of static fields, and, most importantly, a keen eye on the quarterly ledger.
author: Sallus Drek, Senior Compliance Observer

oped.title: Hats Off to the Flood: Why Your Soggy Complaints Are the Real Quota Breach
oped.author: Reginald Blusterforth, Certified Quota Visionary and Founder of the Anti-Plumber Preservation Society
oped.body: The Wasteland Sanitation Authority deserves our thunderous applause for reframing the Ir:Vess Tunnel deluge as a shining quota triumph rather than some petty plumbing failure. Citizens moaning about contaminated runoff simply refuse to taste the static properly or count their irradiated blessings. If anything, the real culprits are those ridiculous wide-brimmed hats that block the beneficial static waves and encourage frivolous demands for actual repairs. As someone whose own basement collection of pre-plague bowler hats now floats in similar effluent, I can attest these accessories foster entitlement. My proposed solution is mandatory hat surrender followed by voluntary submersion drills to build resilience. The plague may have culled the weak, but only proper compliance will finish the job without needing those mythical plumbers.

classifieds.text: Wanted: Desperate plumber or mutant with wrench for Ir:Vess Tunnel overflow. Must ignore static taste and quota signs; pay in scavenged cans before the next triumph.
For Sale: Three waterproof crates and one leaky rowboat from Ir:Vess cleanup crew. Owner fleeing compliance fines; first taker gets the static-scented blessings included.
Lost: One Sanitation Authority badge and dignity during the Ir:Vess quota flood. Finder may keep the badge if they return the last dry sock before citizens start tasting blessings.
Public Notice: Wasteland Sanitation Authority offers sincere apologies for the Ir:Vess overflow while reminding all survivors to count blessings and not the floating debris.

panels.caption: Sanitation chief: 'Ir:Vess Tunnel flood? That's our quota compliance triumph right there.'
Aide: 'Water's up to their necks, boss. No plumbers since the plague.' Chief: 'Then advise them to taste static and count blessings.'
Chief: 'Problem solved. The drowned ones can't file complaints.'

joke.setup: Wasteland Sanitation Authority declared the Ir:Vess Tunnel flood a quota compliance triumph after it finally delivered the required volume of flowing water.
joke.punchline: Survivors noted the achievement would have been more impressive if anyone left alive still knew how to shut it off.
joke.text: Wasteland Sanitation Authority declared the Ir:Vess Tunnel flood a quota compliance triumph after it finally delivered the required volume of flowing water. Survivors noted the achievement would have been more impressive if anyone left alive still knew how to shut it off.

sponsor_ads.headline: Ir:Vess Tunnel Flood Kits: Quota-Approved Overflow in a Can
sponsor_ads.body: Pre-measured effluent pods guaranteed to meet Wasteland Sanitation Authority daily discharge targets without a single licensed plumber; just pop the seal and let the tunnel do the rest.
sponsor_ads.tagline: Results may exceed compliance; survivors not included.

sponsor_ads.headline: No-Plumber Pipe Weevils: Nature's Answer to 90% Workforce Reduction
sponsor_ads.body: Genetically stubborn tunnel beetles that eat blockages, excrete quota sludge, and file their own compliance reports straight to the Authority.
sponsor_ads.tagline: If they reach your settlement, the flood was already a triumph.

sponsor_ads.headline: Sanitation Authority Flood Bonds: Invest in Tomorrow's Deluge
sponsor_ads.body: Purchase shares in Ir:Vess overflow events; every drowned access point pays dividends in waived inspection fees and extra water rations for the remaining ten percent.
sponsor_ads.tagline: Past performance is the only performance.

sponsor_ads.headline: Emergency Quota Reallocation Service: Your Flood, Our Paperwork
sponsor_ads.body: We reclassify your basement seepage as official tunnel-adjacent compliance, sparing you both fines and the impossible task of locating a plumber.

stories.headline: Glassroot Yields Surge 14 Percent After Ir:Vess Infusion Event
stories.deck: Tasting officers log metallic notes as new compliance baseline for quarter.
stories.article:
Wasteland Agricultural Bureau ledgers now record glassroot output across lower warrens at 14 percent above target following direct seepage from the Ir:Vess tunnel. Magnetic tasting crews registered elevated iron signatures and have adjusted all field calibration charts accordingly.

Quota inspectors directed farmers to incorporate measured volumes of tunnel sediment into storage vats before magnetic verification. All deliveries must reach the central tasting node by quarter close to avoid recalibration penalties.

real_world_echo: Marine Le Pen found guilty but cleared for run if she wears tag — mirrored as official held liable for flood yet retained in post under conditional magnetic tether monitoring
